is a manga anthology series based on the Neon Genesis Evangelion anime series. It is compiled into a single volume and it was published by Biblos in May 1996. https://www.amazon.co.jp/%E3%82%A2%E3%83%B3%E3%83%95%E3%82%A1%E3%83%B3%E3%83%86%E3%83%AA%E3%83%96%E3%83%AB-1-F%E2%80%99packs-10/dp/4882714264
